courseTitle: Business, Ethics, Accessibility, and Player Research
title: Monetization Model Game
genericDescription: Evaluate monetization's effect on design; distinguish fair value from manipulation; prototype a business model without exploiting players.
specificDescription: Build a game that simulates premium, subscription, cosmetic, expansion, donation, educational licensing, or free-to-play economics. No real purchases are allowed. Include a monetization ethics note.
gradingRubric: 30 pts model-design alignment; 20 pts ethical restraint; 20 pts economic clarity; 15 pts player communication; 15 pts reflection.
